fixes.description: LLM returned JavaScript-style unquoted property names in ClaimExtractorStage JSON (e.g., `property: "value"` instead of `"property": "value"`). System.Text.Json rejected these. Added regex-based repair in StructuredOutputParser.RepairCommonQuirks to quote bare identifier keys before deserialization.

Gemini RECITATION filter caused empty responses on claim verification; retries sent identical requests (fragile). Added responseMimeType=application/json to Gemini generationConfig to prevent JSON parse failures. Added anti-recitation nudge to empty-response retry prompt instead of resending identical request.

Transcript text was never surfaced in the UI; users had no way to verify claim accuracy against the source. Added Text property to TranscriptExtractedEvent and rendered it in a collapsible section in _TranscriptInfo.cshtml.

LLM calls sent no temperature parameter (defaulting to 1.0), causing non-deterministic claim counts and scores across runs. Fixed by adding Temperature=0.0 to LlmRequest and passing it through AnthropicLlmClient, GeminiLlmClient, and AnthropicClientWrapper.

ClaimVerifierStage silently swallowed JSON parse failures with no logging and no retry. Added ILogger injection, a JSON nudge retry (same pattern as AnthropicClientWrapper), Warning log on first failure, Error log on retry failure.

gemini-3-flash (non-existent) and gemini-2.0-flash (deprecated, EOL June 2026) replaced with gemini-2.5-flash as the Standard model tier. Fast and Standard tiers now both use gemini-2.5-flash; no valid mid-tier Gemini model exists.

StructuredOutputParser regex used \A anchor, causing JSON parse failure when LLM prefixes response with prose before the markdown fence. Fixed by removing anchor, adding brace-counting fallback extraction, and allowing trailing commas.

taskSets.name: Codebase Audit Cleanup (P0 + P1)

tasks.name: Batch 1: Dockerfile fix, dead config, placeholder tests
tasks.notes: Dockerfile 8.0→9.0, DefaultTemperature removed, placeholder tests deleted

tasks.name: Batch 2: Legacy Anthropic cleanup + parser escape fix
tasks.notes: 6 legacy files deleted (-904 lines), AnthropicException moved, StructuredOutputParser backslash counting fixed

tasks.name: Batch 3: BackgroundService replaces Task.Run
tasks.notes: BackgroundAnalysisRunner + IAnalysisDispatcher, bounded Channel, graceful shutdown. Web test fakes simplified.

tasks.name: Batch 4: API key validation + /health endpoint
tasks.notes: Options.Validate() for API keys, AddHealthChecks + MapHealthChecks

tasks.name: Batch 5: Memory eviction for store + event transport
tasks.notes: Timer-based eviction for InMemoryAnalysisStore, subscriber-based cleanup for ChannelEventTransport

tasks.name: Batch 6: Analysis deduplication
tasks.notes: TryGetActiveByVideoId + TrackVideoId on IAnalysisStore. Same video ID returns existing in-progress analysis.

taskSets.postNotes: 224 tests (down from 240 due to 18 deleted legacy/placeholder tests, +2 new parser tests). fix-007 added post-task for unquoted JSON property names. P2 items deferred to .ai/tasks/future-improvements.md.

tasks.name: Temperature=0.0 + LlmRequest.Temperature property
tasks.notes: Temperature wired through AnthropicLlmClient, GeminiLlmClient, AnthropicClientWrapper. DefaultTemperature in options.

tasks.name: ClaimVerifierStage JSON retry + logging
tasks.notes: ILogger injected, Warning on first JSON failure, retry with JSON nudge, Error on second failure.

tasks.name: Harden claim verification against empty/invalid responses
tasks.notes: TryParse<T>/ParseResult<T> structured error handling, configurable MaxVerificationRetries=5, finishReason logging for Gemini empty content, context-aware nudge prompts.

tasks.name: Per-claim logging + progress bar + error reasons
tasks.notes: Stage-level logs, per-claim logs with Interlocked counter, progress bar via ClaimsHeaderModel.VerifiedCount, JSON parser hardening included in same PR

taskSets.name: Multi-Provider LLM Integration

tasks.name: ILlmClient Abstraction + Shared Types
tasks.notes: Placed in LlmProviders/Common/ (not Shared/) — 'Shared' is a reserved VB keyword, CA1716 fires. SearchResultSource uses Uri Url (not string) for type safety. StageModelOptions moved to Core/Options/ as planned.

tasks.name: Gemini Provider Client
tasks.notes: GeminiLlmClient + GeminiGroundingParser + GeminiOptions + GeminiApiException. 18 client tests + 7 grounding parser tests with recorded fixtures.

tasks.name: Anthropic Provider Refactor
tasks.notes: AnthropicLlmClient wraps existing API call patterns. AnthropicWebSearchParser extracts sources from web_search_tool_result blocks. PremiumModel added to AnthropicOptions. 12 client tests + 9 parser tests.

tasks.name: Provider-Agnostic Stage Refactor
tasks.notes: All 5 stages refactored to use ILlmClient. Old Anthropic/Stages/ deleted. Prompts moved to LlmProviders/Stages/Prompts/. AnthropicLlmClientAdapter added as temporary bridge. Fixture copy bug in csproj fixed (missing LlmProviders/Anthropic/Fixtures glob).

tasks.name: DI Wiring + Config + Provider Switch
tasks.notes: ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddLlmProvider() reads LlmProvider config. Program.cs simplified to single AddLlmProvider call. appsettings.json updated with Gemini as default provider, StageModelOptions, GeminiOptions, AnthropicOptions.

tasks.name: Gemini Quality Validation
tasks.notes: Gemini calls confirmed working via manual testing. Throttling issue observed — deferred to separate task.

taskSets.postNotes: Task 016 validated manually. No spike-2-gemini-results.md created — informal validation. Throttling (rate limiting) issue deferred.
